commit.message:
Resources for the Persian language model added!

These changes include:
- Adding a section named Language Model
- Adding ParsBERT to Language Model section
- Adding ParsBERT-NER to the Named Entity Recognition part.

- Adding ParsBERT to Language Model section
- Adding ParsBERT-NER to the Named Entity Recognition part.

readme_html:
Awesome Persian NLP/IR, Tools And Resources

This repository is going to be a curation of every research and efforts on Persian NLP. We segmented this repo into five main sections, as listed below!

Contents

  • Tools
  • Datasets
  • Models
  • Repositories
  • Papers and Books

Contribute

Contributions welcome! Read the contribution guidelines first.

License
